info.title: migrate-mongo
info.description: A .NET global tool for running MongoDB migrations.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MigrateMongo CLI — database migration tool for MongoDB

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create the config file and migrations directory

commands.name: create
commands.description: Scaffold a new timestamped migration file

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Short description used in the migration file name (e.g. "add_user_index")

commands.name: up
commands.description: Apply all pending migrations in timestamp order

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show the status of every discovered migration
